description_long: This is a rectangular table with a visibly weathered, dark wooden top that features a patchwork of planks, each showing signs of age, scratches, and discoloration. The tabletop has a rustic, distressed finish, with some lighter streaks and marks that add to its character. The table is supported by four slender, straight metal legs, each attached at the corners and slightly angled outward for stability. The legs have a dark, matte finish that complements the aged look of the wood. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or additional features, giving the table a minimalist, utilitarian appearance. This table would be well-suited for urban outdoor settings such as parks, public plazas, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A rectangular, rustic table with a distressed dark wooden top and four slender, angled metal legs, showing visible wear and character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the weathered wooden tabletop and two metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow depth of the table and the plank texture of the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the full width and the aged surface details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the narrow depth and the distressed wood grain.
